title: Ocean Villager Trader
description: adds a new villager the Ocean Trader and his lighthouse structure
body:
**This Mod adds a new villager to the game, the Ocean Trader.**

You will find him in his Lighthouse House which can spawn in beach biomes

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59df3e658a1c2d6694abbe07c5200b90938580be.png)

You can also get him by placing the new tradingblock as his workstation.

 
### The major features include:

-  lighthouse structure to explore, loot and trade.
-  a new villager profession with custom trades
-  a completely new armor set with effects
-  turtle sword and axe
-  2 new food items with effects
 

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
